posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Community Hour: Mastering mirroring

Ready to master mirroring? In this community hour, we invited one of our fantastic monday.com knowledge experts to help our community master boards, focusing on what interests our community the most.

Questions for our team? Ask below!

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Julietteb , thanks for posting! Very helpful and education for monday users who just started using monday for their organization.

Just a clarification, I usually see in the community people asking about high level board usage. Their usual use case is to have that High Level Board accessible to stakeholders who are not part of their team. A concern they face is that the stakeholders need to have access to the low level boards before they can view the high level board values. Is that scenario still existing with using connect board and mirror columns?
